value:
Thanks for reaching out, and I'm glad you're enjoying your journey on the East Coast Train! I understand how frustrating glare can be when you're trying to work.

Unfortunately, I'm not able to help with train infrastructure requests like window blinds—those decisions are made by our operations and design teams. However, I'd recommend contacting our main customer service line to formally submit this feedback, as passenger suggestions about onboard comfort do get reviewed and can influence future upgrades.

In the meantime, you might find that adjusting your screen brightness or angle, or using a privacy screen protector, can help reduce glare. Safe travels!
